title: Deciphering programmed cell death for gastric cancer prognosis: AKR1B1 as a key player.
snippet: Gastric cancer (GC) has poor survival due to late diagnosis, heterogeneity, and limited treatment options. Understanding cell death pathways is crucial for developing effective therapies. This study aimed to investigate the prognostic value of multiple Programmed cell death (PCD) in GC, identify key genes associated with PCD. Bioinformatics methods includin...
